name: Carbon/Graphite Raman
description: Raman peak assignments for carbon and graphite samples. Source: rin/data/RAMAN 데이터 정리.pptx, slide 1.

assignments.name: Carbon D band (disorder-induced)
assignments.note: PPTX range: 1300-1370 cm-1. Use with G band for ID/IG ratio.

assignments.name: Carbon G band (graphitic sp2)
assignments.note: PPTX range: 1580-1600 cm-1. Use with D band for ID/IG ratio.
